overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The player navigates through narrow building canyons with holographic advertisements, crosses a street with futuristic vehicles, ascends stairs through a palm tree plaza, and enters an elevator to ascend to an upper floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit canyon street with overhead walkways

events.description: exits narrow building canyon into open street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow neon canyon looking up at towering advertisements, then descending to street level

entered.detail: metal bridge connecting buildings with pink neon advertisements underneath
red neon sign for Silk Road establishment
tall dark building with multiple neon billboards

segments.scene_description: The segment begins looking up through a narrow canyon of towering cyberpunk buildings covered in neon advertisements. The camera moves forward through the enclosed space, passing under an overhead walkway bridge, then descends toward street level where a red neon 'Silk Road' sign becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: crossing the street while orange van passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk, navigating around vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with green hair and purple umbrella walking across the street
orange van driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing on red asphalt
futuristic orange delivery van with illuminated headlights

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a city street at a marked crosswalk, sharing the space with a pedestrian carrying a purple umbrella and avoiding an orange van passing on the left. The environment transitions from the narrow canyon to a more open intersection with visible traffic lights and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with palm trees under overpass

events.description: ascending concrete stairs to upper plaza level
entering palm tree plaza with pink neon Wide Open signage

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs and entering a plaza with palm tree planters and neon signage

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench near palm tree planter

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with graffiti on adjacent wall
colorful gang graffiti on blue wall
large planters with palm trees and green neon lighting
large pink neon billboard displaying wide open text

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a wide concrete staircase marked with 'Tyger Claws' graffiti, emerging into an elevated plaza featuring palm trees in illuminated planters and large pink neon 'Wide Open' signs. A person sits on a bench to the left as the player moves through this semi-covered urban space.

events.description: entering building lobby from outdoor plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through building lobby and entering an elevator with red interior lighting

entered.detail: modern building entrance with glass doors and teal neon lighting
metal security gate elevator with call button panel

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a modern building entrance from the plaza and enters the lobby. Inside, the space features marble floors and illuminated posters flanking a gated elevator. The player calls the elevator and enters the red-lit interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior ascending to upper floor

events.description: elevator begins ascending as indicated by panel display
elevator doors opening to reveal dark corridor

agents.ego_description: standing in elevator watching the ascent on the control panel, then exiting into corridor

entered.detail: red metal paneled walls with vertical support beams
digital display showing floor selection with upward arrows

segments.scene_description: Inside the red-walled elevator, the player watches the digital panel indicate the ascent. The elevator rises steadily until the doors open at approximately 60 seconds, revealing a dark, teal-lit corridor beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit urban canyon to the sterile interior of a high-rise building. It begins by looking up at towering skyscrapers and holographic ads, moving forward under an overhead bridge before descending toward a red Silk Road sign at street level. As the camera crosses a busy intersection alongside a pedestrian with a purple umbrella, the enclosed space opens up into a wide plaza where the player ascends graffiti-covered stairs past illuminated palm trees and pink neon signs. The scene then shifts from the open air into a polished building lobby with marble floors, leading directly into a red-lit elevator. Finally, the camera rises steadily within the elevator until the doors slide open to reveal a dark, teal-lit corridor.
